steps.title: Require both sample dates
steps.content: The task asks when Herrera collected both samples. A complete response must include timing for Trixis antimenorrhoea and timing for Stephanomeria thurberi, not just one specimen.

steps.title: Avoid unrelated details
steps.content: The notes about family classification, viewing the specimens online, and where each sample was found are secondary. They do not answer the timing-focused goal unless the dates for both samples are included.

steps.title: Eliminate missing timing
steps.content:
• A: says where many samples can now be found but gives no collection dates.
  • B: emphasizes locations, not dates.
  • C: gives a date for only Trixis antimenorrhoea.
  • D: gives June 1930 for Trixis antimenorrhoea and May 1929 for Stephanomeria thurberi.
The answer is D.
